---
title: "Contact"
---

The A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice programme welcomes correspondence on
review, endorsement, collaboration, and constructive critique.

## Primary contact

- **GitHub:** [@JackDMenendez](https://github.com/JackDMenendez)
- **Email:** *(add public-facing email here once decided)*
- **ORCID:** *(add ORCID iD here once registered for the series)*

## What to expect when you reach out

- **Reviewers / endorsers.** If you are willing to provide an arXiv
  endorsement or pre-submission review for a paper in the series,
  the most useful first message is the paper version you are
  willing to look at (Paper I, Paper II, Paper III, or the
  in-progress capstone) and any time-boxing on your availability.
- **Collaborators.** Open issues at the series project board, or
  the relevant paper repository, are the best public conversation
  surface. For initial scoping, email or GitHub is fine.
- **Press / general inquiry.** Email; allow several weeks for a
  considered response.

## Project board and repositories

- **Series project board:**
  <https://github.com/users/JackDMenendez/projects/6/views/1?layout_template=table>
- **Project-tracking repository:**
  <https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project>
- **Paper repositories:** see the [papers page](papers/index.qmd).
